daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events Await: Launches and Auroras on the Horizon

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha 'Stairway to Seven' Test Flight
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's Flight 7 will be a test flight and return-To-Flight for the launch vehicle after its April 2025 launch failure. It will test and validate key systems ahead of Firefly’s Block II configuration upgrade on Flight 8.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for test flight insights.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A possible aurora event with a Kp index of 4.33 is predicted, offering a chance for aurora sightings at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check northern skies if conditions are clear.

top_events.title: SpaceX Starlink Group 17-23 Launch
top_events.description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation will be launched, contributing to global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Follow live stream for real-time updates.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
